container in privileged mode.\nProcesses in privileged containers are essentially equivalent to root on the host.\nDefaults to false.\nNote that this field cannot be set when spec.os.name is windows."},{"id":"field-nvidia-com-v1beta1-spec-components-podtemplate-spec-initcontainers-securitycontext-procmount","path":"spec.components[].podTemplate.spec.initContainers[].securityContext.procMount","type":"string","required":false,"description":"procMount denotes the type of proc mount to use for the containers.\nThe default value is Default which uses the container runtime defaults for\nreadonly paths and masked paths.\nThis requires the ProcMountType feature flag to be enabled.\nNote that this field cannot be set when spec.os.name is windows."},{"id":"field-nvidia-com-v1beta1-spec-components-podtemplate-spec-initcontainers-securitycontext-readonlyrootfilesystem","path":"spec.components[].podTemplate.spec.initContainers[].securityContext.readOnlyRootFilesystem","type":"boolean","required":false,"description":"Whether this container has a read-only root filesystem.\nDefault is false.\nNote that this field cannot be set when spec.os.name is windows."},{"id":"field-nvidia-com-v1beta1-spec-components-podtemplate-spec-initcontainers-securitycontext-runasgroup","path":"spec.components[].podTemplate.spec.initContainers[].securityContext.runAsGroup","type":"integer/int64","required":false,"description":"The GID to run the entrypoint of the container process.\nUses runtime default if unset.\nMay also be set in PodSecurityContext.  If set in both SecurityContext and\nPodSecurityContext, the value specified in SecurityContext takes precedence.\nNote that this field cannot be set when spec.os.name is windows.","metadata":["format: int64"]},{"id":"field-nvidia-com-v1beta1-spec-components-podtemplate-spec-initcontainers-securitycontext-runasnonroot","path":"spec.components[].podTemplate.spec.initContainers[].securityContext.runAsNonRoot","type":"boolean","required":false,"description":"Indicates that the container must run as a non-root user.\nIf true, the Kubelet will validate the image at runtime to ensure that it\ndoes not run as UID 0 (root) and fail to start the container if it does.\nIf unset or false, no such validation will be performed.\nMay also be set in PodSecurityContext.  If set in both SecurityContext and\nPodSecurityContext, the value specified in SecurityContext takes precedence."},{"id":"field-nvidia-com-v1beta1-spec-components-podtemplate-spec-initcontainers-securitycontext-runasuser","path":"spec.components[].podTemplate.spec.initContainers[].securityContext.runAsUser","type":"integer/int64","required":false,"description":"The UID to run the entrypoint of the container process.\nDefaults to user specified in image metadata if unspecified.\nMay also be set in PodSecurityContext.  If set in both SecurityContext and\nPodSecurityContext, the value specified in SecurityContext takes precedence.\nNote that this field cannot be set when spec.os.name is windows.","metadata":["format: int64"]},{"id":"field-nvidia-com-v1beta1-spec-components-podtemplate-spec-initcontainers-securitycontext-selinuxoptions","path":"spec.components[].podTemplate.spec.initContainers[].securityContext.seLinuxOptions","type":"object","required":false,"description":"The SELinux context to be applied to the container.\nIf unspecified, the container runtime will allocate a random SELinux context for each\ncontainer.  May also be set in PodSecurityContext.  If set in both SecurityContext and\nPodSecurityContext, the value specified in SecurityContext takes precedence.\nNote that this field cannot be set when spec.os.name is windows."},{"id":"field-nvidia-com-v1beta1-spec-components-podtemplate-spec-initcontainers-securitycontext-selinuxoptions-level","path":"spec.components[].podTemplate.spec.initContainers[].securityContext.seLinuxOptions.level","type":"string","required":false,"description":"Level is SELinux level label that applies to the container."},{"id":"field-nvidia-com-v1beta1-spec-components-podtemplate-spec-initcontainers-securitycontext-selinuxoptions-role","path":"spec.components[].podTemplate.spec.initContainers[].securityContext.seLinuxOptions.role","type":"string","required":false,"description":"Role is a SELinux role label that applies to the container."},{"id":"field-nvidia-com-v1beta1-spec-components-podtemplate-spec-initcontainers-securitycontext-selinuxoptions-type","path":"spec.components[].podTemplate.spec.initContainers[].securityContext.seLinuxOptions.type","type":"string","required":false,"description":"Type is a SELinux type label that applies to the container."},{"id":"field-nvidia-com-v1beta1-spec-components-podtemplate-spec-initcontainers-securitycontext-selinuxoptions-user","path":"spec.components[].podTemplate.spec.initContainers[].securityContext.seLinuxOptions.user","type":"string","required":false,"description":"User is a SELinux user label that applies to the container."},{"id":"field-nvidia-com-v1beta1-spec-components-podtemplate-spec-initcontainers-securitycontext-seccompprofile","path":"spec.components[].podTemplate.spec.initContainers[].securityContext.seccompProfile","type":"object","required":false,"description":"The seccomp options to use by this container. If seccomp options are\nprovided at both the pod & container level, the container options\noverride the pod options.\nNote that this field cannot be set when spec.os.name is windows.","metadata":["requiredFields: type"]},{"id":"field-nvidia-com-v1beta1-spec-components-podtemplate-spec-initcontainers-securitycontext-seccompprofile-localhostprofile","path":"spec.components[].podTemplate.spec.initContainers[].securityContext.seccompProfile.localhostProfile","type":"string","required":false,"description":"localhostProfile indicates a profile defined in a file on the node should be used.\nThe profile must be preconfigured on the node to work.\nMust be a descending path, relative to the kubelet's configured seccomp profile location.\nMust be set if type is \"Localhost\". Must NOT be set for any other type."},{"id":"field-nvidia-com-v1beta1-spec-components-podtemplate-spec-initcontainers-securitycontext-seccompprofile-type","path":"spec.components[].podTemplate.spec.initContainers[].securityContext.seccompProfile.type","type":"string","required":true,"description":"type indicates which kind of seccomp profile will be applied.\nValid options are:\n\nLocalhost - a profile defined in a file on the node should be used.\nRuntimeDefault - the container runtime default profile should be used.\nUnconfined - no profile should be applied."},{"id":"field-nvidia-com-v1beta1-spec-components-podtemplate-spec-initcontainers-securitycontext-windowsoptions","path":"spec.components[].podTemplate.spec.initContainers[].securityContext.windowsOptions","type":"object","required":false,"description":"The Windows specific settings applied to all containers.\nIf unspecified, the options from the PodSecurityContext will be used.\nIf set in both SecurityContext and PodSecurityContext, the value specified in SecurityContext takes precedence.\nNote that this field cannot be set when spec.os.name is linux."},{"id":"field-nvidia-com-v1beta1-spec-components-podtemplate-spec-initcontainers-securitycontext-windowsoptions-gmsacredentialspec","path":"spec.components[].podTemplate.spec.initContainers[].securityContext.windowsOptions.gmsaCredentialSpec","type":"string","required":false,"description":"GMSACredentialSpec is where the GMSA admission webhook\n(https://github.com/kubernetes-sigs/windows-gmsa) inlines the contents of the\nGMSA credential spec named by the GMSACredentialSpecName field."},{"id":"field-nvidia-com-v1beta1-spec-components-podtemplate-spec-initcontainers-securitycontext-windowsoptions-gmsacredentialspecname","path":"spec.components[].podTemplate.spec.initContainers[].securityContext.windowsOptions.gmsaCredentialSpecName","type":"string","required":false,"description":"GMSACredentialSpecName is the name of the GMSA credential spec to use."},{"id":"field-nvidia-com-v1beta1-spec-components-podtemplate-spec-initcontainers-securitycontext-windowsoptions-hostprocess","path":"spec.components[].podTemplate.spec.initContainers[].securityContext.windowsOptions.hostProcess","type":"boolean","required":false,"description":"HostProcess determines if a container should be run as a 'Host Process' container.\nAll of a Pod's containers must have the same effective HostProcess value\n(it is not allowed to have a mix of HostProcess containers and non-HostProcess containers).\nIn addition, if HostProcess is true then HostNetwork must also be set to true."},{"id":"field-nvidia-com-v1beta1-spec-components-podtemplate-spec-initcontainers-securitycontext-windowsoptions-runasusername","path":"spec.components[].podTemplate.spec.initContainers[].securityContext.windowsOptions.runAsUserName","type":"string","required":false,"description":"The UserName in Windows to run the entrypoint of the container process.\nDefaults to the user specified in image metadata if unspecified.\nMay also be set in PodSecurityContext. If set in both SecurityContext and\nPodSecurityContext, the value specified in SecurityContext takes precedence."},{"id":"field-nvidia-com-v1beta1-spec-components-podtemplate-spec-initcontainers-startupprobe","path":"spec.components[].podTemplate.spec.initContainers[].startupProbe","type":"object","required":false,"description":"StartupProbe indicates that the Pod has successfully initialized.\nIf specified, no other probes are executed until this completes successfully.\nIf this probe fails, the Pod will be restarted, just as if the livenessProbe failed.\nThis can be used to provide different probe parameters at the beginning of a Pod's lifecycle,\nwhen it might take a long time to load data or warm a cache, than during steady-state operation.\nThis cannot be updated.\nMore info: https://kubernetes.io/docs/concepts/workloads/pods/pod-lifecycle#container-probes"},{"id":"field-nvidia-com-v1beta1-spec-components-podtemplate-spec-initcontainers-startupprobe-exec","path":"spec.components[].podTemplate.spec.initContainers[].startupProbe.exec","type":"object","required":false,"description":"Exec specifies a command to execute in the container."},{"id":"field-nvidia-com-v1beta1-spec-components-podtemplate-spec-initcontainers-startupprobe-exec-command","path":"spec.components[].podTemplate.spec.initContainers[].startupProbe.exec.command","type":"array<string>","required":false,"description":"Command is the command line to execute inside the container, the working directory for the\ncommand  is root ('/') in the container's filesystem. The command is simply exec'd, it is\nnot run inside a shell, so traditional shell instructions ('|', etc) won't work. To use\na shell, you need to explicitly call out to that shell.\nExit status of 0 is treated as live/healthy and non-zero is unhealthy.","metadata":["x-kubernetes-list-type: atomic"]},{"id":"field-nvidia-com-v1beta1-spec-components-podtemplate-spec-initcontainers-startupprobe-exec-command","path":"spec.components[].podTemplate.spec.initContainers[].startupProbe.exec.command[]","type":"string","required":true},{"id":"field-nvidia-com-v1beta1-spec-components-podtemplate-spec-initcontainers-startupprobe-failurethreshold","path":"spec.components[].podTemplate.spec.initContainers[].startupProbe.failureThreshold","type":"integer/int32","required":false,"description":"Minimum consecutive failures for the probe to be considered failed after having succeeded.\nDefaults to 3. Minimum value is 1.","metadata":["format: int32"]},{"id":"field-nvidia-com-v1beta1-spec-components-podtemplate-spec-initcontainers-startupprobe-grpc","path":"spec.components[].podTemplate.spec.initContainers[].startupProbe.grpc","type":"object","required":false,"description":"GRPC specifies a GRPC HealthCheckRequest.","metadata":["requiredFields: port"]},{"id":"field-nvidia-com-v1beta1-spec-components-podtemplate-spec-initcontainers-startupprobe-grpc-port","path":"spec.components[].podTemplate.spec.initContainers[].startupProbe.grpc.port","type":"integer/int32","required":true,"description":"Port number of the gRPC service. Number must be in the range 1 to 65535.","metadata":["format: int32"]},{"id":"field-nvidia-com-v1beta1-spec-components-podtemplate-spec-initcontainers-startupprobe-grpc-service","path":"spec.components[].podTemplate.spec.initContainers[].startupProbe.grpc.service","type":"string","required":false,"description":"Service is the name of the service to place in the gRPC HealthCheckRequest\n(see https://github.com/grpc/grpc/blob/master/doc/health-checking.md).\n\nIf this is not specified, the default behavior is defined by gRPC.","metadata":["default: \"\""]},{"id":"field-nvidia-com-v1beta1-spec-components-podtemplate-spec-initcontainers-startupprobe-httpget","path":"spec.components[].podTemplate.spec.initContainers[].startupProbe.httpGet","type":"object","required":false,"description":"HTTPGet specifies an HTTP GET request to perform.","metadata":["requiredFields: port"]},{"id":"field-nvidia-com-v1beta1-spec-components-podtemplate-spec-initcontainers-startupprobe-httpget-host","path":"spec.components[].podTemplate.spec.initContainers[].startupProbe.httpGet.host","type":"string","required":false,"description":"Host name to connect to, defaults to the pod IP.
